data.body:
Review (cold, fresh context): PASS with one inline minor fix.

Reviewed: plan file, audit doc, git diff (only .lattice/ files changed), test baseline.

Verified against plan acceptance criteria:
- Audit doc structure follows audit-prompt section 10 (Page metadata, Scope in/out, House identity, Inversion check, Cross-house leak check, Typography audit, Color audit, Forward observations, Gap appendix).
- Both in-scope files (EventsPage.tsx + Events.tsx) covered with typography and color rows.
- All 4 typography + 7 color worked-example rows from plan present verbatim in correct order.
- Out-of-scope exclusions documented: FractalPattern, Navbar/Footer/FadeIn/MandelbrotIcon/CornerDecorations, SectorHeader internals, Button component.
- Orphan status of Events.tsx documented (not imported in live src/ tree at HEAD; verified via grep).
- House identity: events id = Events displayName; token slug house-events-{light,deep}; default arrangement; not inverted.
- Cross-house leak check: full walked-token list documented; none found.
- Mobile-first responsive renderings listed where applicable (text-3xl md:text-5xl, text-5xl md:text-7xl).
- Raw #D4857A → EXACT MIGRATE to house-events-light (correct EventsPage.tsx:11 reference).
- Raw #C13B2A SectorHeader prop → EXACT MIGRATE to house-events-deep (correct EventsPage.tsx:17 reference).
- FractalPattern #C13B2A → EXCLUDED with traceability note.
- text-foreground on bg-house-events-light → JUSTIFY (canonical token used deliberately; departure from FRAC-42 paired-foreground convention surfaced as Forward observation, not a finding).
- bg-foreground/[0.03] + border-foreground/20 → EXACT no-op MIGRATE with translucent-foreground-as-surface-tint exempt-composite rationale per Campus precedent.
- Selection chrome → EXACT no-op (paired-inverse, FRAC-42 exempt).
- bg-background pairing NEAR → add text-foreground.
- bg-muted pairing NEAR → add text-muted-foreground.
- Gap appendix: 'No gaps.' (matches planner expectation).
- Forward observations include the three planner-flagged candidates: editorial-voice question (charcoal-on-coral vs cream-on-saturated), chrome-on-h2 accidental-italic, orphan Events.tsx deletion candidate. Bonus observation on Luma embed wrapper as recess-surface pattern.
- No src/ changes, no DESIGN.md, no audit-prompt.md, no sibling audit doc edits.
- Tests baseline: 4 failures match the documented pre-existing list exactly (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen). NOT regressions.

Minor fix applied inline: typo in SectorHeader color row referenced 'CampusPage:190' for the Campus precedent; corrected to 'Campus.tsx:190' (the call site lives in sections/Campus.tsx, not pages/CampusPage.tsx). Single-line edit; no structural impact.

Result: PASS. Recommend transition to done.
